$comment: Records the exact quaat/autonomous-development revision this extension's compatibility contract was derived from. Regenerate with `npm run verify:reference -- --update` after deliberately re-mirroring upstream schemas, and reconcile docs/REFERENCE.md in the same change. The `schemas` map covers files mirrored verbatim from upstream `schemas/`; `run-event.schema.json` is this project's own protocol schema and is intentionally excluded.
notes: Run-state is at schema_version 2; there is no schema v3 upstream.
validate_state does not validate run-state.json against a bundled schema (run-state schema validation is deferred upstream), so no run-state.schema.json is mirrored.
If a future upstream release freezes a run-state schema and bumps the version, treat that as a new dependency: mirror it, extend the parser, and update this lock plus docs/REFERENCE.md.
